queries.question: What certificate qualification does Lisa have?
queries.sql: select name, issueDate from Certificate join  Investigative_Journalist on Investigative_Journalist.CertificateID = Certificate.CertificateID where firstName = 'Lisa'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?issuedate WHERE {
  ?certificate a :Certificate .
  ?investigative_journalist a :Investigative_Journalist .
  ?investigative_journalist p:hasCertificate ?certificate .
  ?certificate p:name ?name .
  ?certificate p:issueDate ?issuedate .
  ?investigative_journalist p:firstName ?firstname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = "Lisa")
}

queries.question: What is the degree of the journalist who wrote the last article?
queries.sql:
select title, major from Degree join  Investigative_Journalist on Investigative_Journalist.degreeID = Degree.degreeID join Article 
 on  Article.journalistID  = Investigative_Journalist.journalistID order by publishedDate desc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?major WHERE {
  ?degree a :Degree .
  ?investigative_journalist a :Investigative_Journalist .
  ?investigative_journalist p:hasDegree ?degree .
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:hasInvestigative_Journalist ?investigative_journalist .
  ?degree p:title ?title .
  ?degree p:major ?major .
  ?article p:publishedDate ?publisheddate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publisheddate_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What is the degree and certificate of the journalist who wrote the last article?
queries.sql:
select title, major, name, issueDate from Degree join  Investigative_Journalist on Investigative_Journalist.degreeID = Degree.degreeID join Article 
 on  Article.journalistID  = Investigative_Journalist.journalistID join  Certificate on Investigative_Journalist.CertificateID = Certificate.CertificateID order by publishedDate desc limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?major ?name ?issuedate WHERE {
  ?degree a :Degree .
  ?investigative_journalist a :Investigative_Journalist .
  ?investigative_journalist p:hasDegree ?degree .
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:hasInvestigative_Journalist ?investigative_journalist .
  ?certificate a :Certificate .
  ?investigative_journalist p:hasCertificate ?certificate .
  ?degree p:title ?title .
  ?degree p:major ?major .
  ?certificate p:name ?name .
  ?certificate p:issueDate ?issuedate .
  ?article p:publishedDate ?publisheddate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?publisheddate_o)
LIMIT 1

  ?investigative_journalist a :Investigative_Journalist .
  ?investigative_journalist p:hasDegree ?degree .
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:hasInvestigative_Journalist ?investigative_journalist .

  ?article a :Articles .

  ?certificate p:name ?name .

  ?article p:publishedDate ?publisheddate_o .

  full: { SELECT ?title ?major ?name ?issuedate WHERE {
  ?degree a :Degree .
  ?investigative_journalist a :Investigative_Journalist .
  ?investigative_journalist p:hasDegree ?degree .
  ?article a :Articles .

}
ORDER BY DESC(?publisheddate_o)

}
